sql: SELECT u.id, u.name, u.department, u.salary, ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY department ORDER BY id) as rn, COUNT(*) OVER (PARTITION BY department) as partition_cnt, SUM(salary) OVER (PARTITION BY department ORDER BY id ROWS BETWEEN UNBOUNDED PRECEDING AND CURRENT ROW) as running_sum FROM users u WHERE u.status = #{status} AND u.department_id IN (#{deptIds})
templateSql:
WITH ranked_data AS (
    SELECT
        u.id, u.name, u.department, u.salary,
        ROW_NUMBER() OVER (
            <choose>
                <when test="partitionBy == 'department'">PARTITION BY department</when>
                <when test="partitionBy == 'status'">PARTITION BY status</when>
                <otherwise>PARTITION BY department, status</otherwise>
            </choose>
            ORDER BY
            <choose>
                <when test="orderBy == 'salary_desc'">salary DESC</when>
                <when test="orderBy == 'name'">name</when>
                <otherwise>id</otherwise>
            </choose>
        ) as rn,
        COUNT(*) OVER (
            <if test="partitionBy != null">PARTITION BY ${partitionBy}</if>
            <if test="partitionBy == null">PARTITION BY department</if>
        ) as partition_cnt,
        SUM(salary) OVER (
            <if test="partitionBy != null">PARTITION BY ${partitionBy}</if>
            <if test="partitionBy == null">PARTITION BY department</if>
            ORDER BY id
            ROWS BETWEEN UNBOUNDED PRECEDING AND CURRENT ROW
        ) as running_sum
    FROM users u
    <where>
        <if test="status != null">
            AND u.status = #{status}
        </if>
        <if test="deptIds != null and deptIds.size() > 0">
            AND u.department_id IN
            <foreach collection="deptIds" item="did" open="(" separator="," close=")">
                #{did}
            </foreach>
        </if>
    </where>
)
SELECT * FROM ranked_data
<if test="minRank != null">
    WHERE rn >= #{minRank}
</if>
<if test="maxRank != null">
    AND rn <= #{maxRank}
</if>
